description: Intelligent Workspace Staffing interview questions. 6 questions per department x 17 departments = 102 questions. Each yes-answer triggers a specialist agent creation.

decision_rule.permanent: Task runs daily/weekly/monthly AND needs memory of past work OR maintains ongoing relationships
decision_rule.subagent: Task is one-time, occasional, or batch with no dependency on history

questions.question: Does your marketing team post content on social media on a daily or weekly schedule?
Do you send email newsletters or email campaigns on a recurring basis (weekly or more)?
Do you run paid advertising campaigns continuously (Facebook Ads, Google Ads, etc.)?
Do you create SEO content on an ongoing basis (blog posts, articles, landing pages)?
Do you manage a CRM or marketing automation platform that tracks leads over time?
Do you occasionally need one-off creative assets like a single flyer or one-time campaign design?
Does your sales team manage ongoing lead follow-up sequences like drip campaigns or nurture flows?
Does your team maintain ongoing prospect relationships over weeks or months before closing?
Does your team send proposals and negotiate contracts on a regular basis?
Does your team manage a CRM pipeline that needs daily or weekly updates?
Do you occasionally need one-time prospect research or list building?
Do you run one-time sales campaigns or blitzes that do not repeat?
Does your team send invoices on a recurring schedule (monthly, weekly, or quarterly)?
Does your team follow up on overdue accounts or collections regularly?
